briefing.headline: Your portfolio is stable overall, but crypto concentration and a stale Kraken feed deserve attention before acting on new ideas.

Kraken data is stale, so crypto exposure may be understated.

signals.headline: Shipping and Strait disruption risk remains elevated
signals.summary: Further disruption could push oil and freight costs higher and increase market volatility.
signals.marketImpact: Supports energy prices, pressures transport and consumer margins.

signals.headline: Oil sensitivity is the fastest transmission channel
signals.summary: Energy shocks can move inflation expectations, rates assumptions, and sector leadership quickly.
signals.marketImpact: Benefits energy exposure; hurts rate-sensitive and consumer sectors.

signals.headline: Risk-off rotation probability has increased
signals.summary: Escalation can strengthen demand for cash, defensives, and high-quality balance sheets.
signals.marketImpact: Raises downside pressure on speculative assets and high-beta crypto positions.
